zh.lifeSummary: 當John Gleason Wheelock於1774年2月10日出生在美國麻薩諸塞州伍斯特史福斯波利時，他的父親Jonathan Wheelock  Sr.46歲，母親Anna Drury39歲。他於1795年12月3日與Lavina Clark在美國佛蒙特州溫莎女爵維亞黑斯費爾德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他在美國紐約州艾利蘭卡斯特蘭卡斯特住了大約15年。他去世於1855年7月24日在美國紐約州艾利蘭卡斯特包曼斯維爾享年81歲，埋葬在美國紐約州艾利布費阿洛科華士 勞 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Gleason Wheelock于1774年2月10日出生在美国马萨诸塞州伍斯特史福斯波利时，他的父亲Jonathan Wheelock  Sr.46岁，母亲Anna Drury39岁。他于1795年12月3日与Lavina Clark在美国佛蒙特州溫莎女爵維亞黑斯費爾德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他在美国纽约州艾利蘭卡斯特蘭卡斯特住了大约15年。他去世于1855年7月24日在美国纽约州艾利蘭卡斯特包曼斯維爾享年81岁，埋葬在美国纽约州艾利布費阿洛科華士 勞 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Wheelock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Worcestershire and Staffordshire): habitational name from a place so named in Cheshire. The placename is derived from the river Wheelock; the river name means ‘winding river’, from British Suilāco-.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

nameMeanings.name: Gleason
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Waterford): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Glasáin, from a diminutive of glas ‘green, blue, gray’.

variants.name: Glasheen
meanings: Irish (Munster): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Glaisín,based on a diminutive of glas ‘green, blue, gray’. Compare Gleason .

variants.name: Glisan
meanings: Possibly an altered form of Irish   Gleason  . This surname is concentrated in IL and PA.

variants.name: Gleeson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Donal, Siobhan, Brendan, Conor.

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: Albany is Named Capital of New York
historicEvents.description: Albany became the capital of New York in 1797. Albany is the oldest continuous settlement of the original 13 colonies.

historicEvents.title: Movement to Washington D.C.
historicEvents.description: While the growth of the new nation was exponential, the United States didn’t have permanent location to house the Government. The First capital was temporary in New York City but by the second term of George Washington the Capital moved to Philadelphia for the following 10 years. Ultimately during the Presidency of John Adams, the Capital found a permanent home in the District of Columbia.

historicEvents.title: Panic! of 1819
historicEvents.description: With the Aftermath of the Napoleonic Wars the global market for trade was down. During this time, America had its first financial crisis and it lasted for only two years.
U.S. acquires vast tracts of Mexican territory in wake of Mexican War including California and New Mexico.

en.lifeSummary: When John Gleason Wheelock was born on 10 February 1774, in Shrewsbury, Worcester, Massachusetts, United States, his father, Jonathan Wheelock  Sr., was 46 and his mother, Anna Drury, was 39. He married Lavina Clark on 3 December 1795, in Weathersfield, Windsor, Vermont, United States. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. He lived in Lancaster, Lancaster, Erie, New York, United States for about 15 years. He died on 24 July 1855, in Bowmansville, Lancaster, Erie, New York, United States, at the age of 81, and was buried in Forest Lawn Cemetery, Buffalo, Erie, New York, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Gleason Wheelock est né le 10 février 1774, à Shrewsbury, Worcester, Massachusetts, États-Unis, son père, Jonathan Wheelock  Sr., avait 46 ans et sa mère, Anna Drury, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Lavina Clark le 3 décembre 1795, à Weathersfield, Windsor, Vermont, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Il a vécu à Lancaster, Lancaster, Erie, New York, États-Unis pendant environ 15 ans. Il est décédé le 24 juillet 1855, à Bowmansville, Lancaster, Erie, New York, États-Unis, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterré à Forest Lawn Cemetery, Buffalo, Erie, New York, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Gleason Wheelock am 10. Februar 1774 in Shrewsbury, Worcester, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jonathan Wheelock  Sr. 46 und seine Mutter Anna Drury 39. Er hat am 3. Dezember 1795 in Weathersfield, Windsor, Vermont, Vereinigte Staaten Lavina Clark geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er hat ungefähr 15 Jahre lang in Lancaster, Lancaster, Erie, New York, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er starb am 24. Juli 1855 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Bowmansville, Lancaster, Erie, New York, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Forest Lawn Cemetery, Buffalo, Erie, New York, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Gleason Wheelock è nato il il 10 febbraio 1774 nel Shrewsbury, Worcester, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America, il suo padre, Jonathan Wheelock  Sr., aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Anna Drury, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Lavina Clark il 3 dicembre 1795, nel Weathersfield, Windsor, Vermont, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie. Vissuto a Lancaster, Lancaster, Erie, New York, Stati Uniti d'America per circa 15 anni. Morì il 24 luglio 1855, nel Bowmansville, Lancaster, Erie, New York, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolto a Forest Lawn Cemetery, Buffalo, Erie, New York, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: John Gleason Wheelockが1774年2月10日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ウオルセスターシュリュースブリーで生まれた時，父Jonathan Wheelock  Sr.は46歳，母Anna Druryは39歳であった。1795年12月3日にアメリカ合衆国バーモント州ウィンドソルウエアスエルスフィールドでLavina Clarkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼はアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州エリーランカスターランカスターに約15年間住んでいた。彼は1855年7月24日にアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州エリーランカスターボウマンスヴィルで81歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州エリーブファロフォーエスト ラウン セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Gleason Wheelock(이)가 1774년 2월 10일 미국 매사추세츠 주 워스스터 슈레w스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jonathan Wheelock  Sr.(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Anna Drury(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1795년 12월 3일 미국 버몬트 주 윈드소르 웨더스필드에서 Lavina Clark(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 미국 뉴욕 주 에리 랭커스터 랭커스터에서 약 15년 동안 살았다. 그는 1855년 7월 24일 미국 뉴욕 주 에리 랭커스터 보우먼스빌에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 뉴욕 주 에리 버팔로 포레스트 로 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Gleason Wheelock nasceu em 10 de fevereiro de 1774, em Shrewsbury, Worcester, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Jonathan Wheelock  Sr., tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Anna Drury, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Lavina Clark em 3 de dezembro de 1795, em Weathersfield, Windsor, Vermonte, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele viveu em Lancaster, Lancaster, Erie, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América por quase 15 anos. Ele faleceu em 24 de julho de 1855, em Bowmansville, Lancaster, Erie, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América, com 81 anos, e foi sepultado em Forest Lawn Cemetery, Buffalo, Erie, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Gleason Wheelock родился 10 февраля 1774 г. в местности шрюсбури, ворсестир, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени Jonathan Wheelock  Sr. было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Drury, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Lavina Clark 3 декабря 1795 г. в местности витирсфиелд, виндзор, Вермонт, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он жил в местности ланкастир, ланкастир, эри, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты около 15 лет. Он умер 24 июля 1855 г. в местности боумансвилл, ланкастир, эри, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 81 год и был похоронен в местности форест лавн кеметири, буффалоу, эри, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Gleason Wheelock nació el 10 de febrero de 1774, en Shrewsbury, Worcester, Masachusets, Estados Unidos, su papá, Jonathan Wheelock  Sr., tenía 46 años y su mamá, Anna Drury, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Lavina Clark el 3 de diciembre de 1795, en Weathersfield, Windsor, Vermont, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. Vivió en Lancaster, Lancaster, Erie, Nueva York, Estados Unidos durante unos 15 años. Murió el 24 de julio de 1855, en Bowmansville, Lancaster, Erie, Nueva York, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultado en Forest Lawn Cemetery, Buffalo, Erie, Nueva York, Estados Unidos.
